description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named map that uses the jonzelner/rstan:latest Docker image, runs the command `make map`, and stores the generated `output` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a job named pages that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image, depends on the map job, runs `mkdir -p web/images`, `cp output/hotspot_map.jpg web/images/.`, `gem install jekyll`, and `cd web && jekyll build -d ../public`, then publishes the `public` directory as an artifact, and configure it to run only on the master branch.
